reforms.description: In February 2012, the authorities announced an integrated set of measures to enhance the effectiveness of job search assistance through the Programa de Relançamento do Serviço Público de Emprego, aiming to increase public employment service placements and vacancy registrations.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving job search assistance can enhance labor market outcomes, thereby increasing employment and productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The authorities announced an integrated set of measures to make job search assistance more effective.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant overhaul of the public employment service, aiming to improve job placement and reduce unemployment, which is crucial for economic recovery.
reforms.source_quote: In February 2012, the authorities announced an integrated set of measures to make job search assistance more effective.
